reviews.review_msg: She is a very kind person super engaging and enthusiastic however her quizzes are so hard!!! Eveb if I studied I didn't knew where the questions were coming from. She also has extra assignments to do on your own that are "complimentary" but it doesn't seem like it.

Probably the best professor for this subject. Practise a lot and do the extra example she posts and you would be fine. The grades are curved and the average is C+. If she can teach economics to someone as dumb as me she can teach economics to anyone.

She is so fun when it comes to explaining things as She will provide you with reallife example. She is a good professor. Quiz might be hard sometimes. She gave lots of practice questions for those who want to learn more. Make sure to do all the extra question to get a good score in quiz! Overall, She is great, quizzess can be hard.

She explains the lectures pretty well and is specific to make students easy to understand and study. Some quizzes are trickly, but study the lectures from her notes, then you will do well in this course. If you have questions you can directly contact her. Highly recommend students to take her class. Good professor!

She explained each chapter in every week very detail and was easy to understand. For example, she gave the everyday life basis example to apply with the microeconomics principle. Therefore, I could not agree more that I never get bored when listening to her lecture. Moreover, she also has a good sense of humour. The lecture sheet is detailed.

She's amazing but her quizzes are challenging. You have to read the questions carefully since they're tricky. But Shauna is a good prof herself, you should visit her office hours, she's ready to help. Her lectures are clear and understandable. I wouldn't take her again only because of quizzes. BTW she doesn't have mids, only tests every week

Shauna explains very well but her exams are quite unrelated to her exams. She is a good teacher, helpful but it is difficult to pass her course. She has good notes that will be helpful in future classes as well. I highly recommend recording her lecture to help you in the exams.
Shauna is a good teacher however her in class questions are so easy compared to her exams. She is a hilarious teacher but her exams are so hard. Be prepared.
The best economic instructor. I love her

Shauna is hilarious and explains the concepts very well. Her notes are clear and she also provides you with extra material to practice. Make sure you do her practice questions and pay attention in class and you should be fine. Exams are fair but a bit tricky.
One of the most amazing instructors I have ever met. Choose and learn with her, you will not regret.
I love her. She makes me feel responsible for what I study and be engaged in economics.
she is super nice
she is nice. she has enough material to you and you don't need to buy the book. also, her teaching skill is very good. the exam is very fair and it is not very difficult.
SHE IS SO PATIENT AND LOVELY! LOVE HER! IF YOU HAVE ANY QUESTIONS, JUST ASK HER, SHE WILL HELP YOU TILL YOU UNDERSTAND
no
Interesting lecturesclear notes thoroughly explained examples and excellent exercise materials.
One of the best professor.. She is a friend more that a teacher. Really helpful !!
Very good prof, Best teacher ever

Shauna is amazing prof. Her notes are really helpful. My advice is to make review and practice questions after each lecture, it will help you a lot. Do everything at time, ask questions during office hours and you will succeed in this course. In fact, attendance is not mandatory, but she gives points  for class participation.
One of the sweetest teacher. Very clear. Just read her notes and go through her moodle page. Thats all you need.
She is the best teacher ever. Her notes are very clearly and useful. I really really really love her!!!
I love her........best prof in my life
I love her
Great

most definatley the BEST teacher i have ever had. She makes class interesting and teaches the material really really well. Work load is very light...midterms are challenging but as long as you study the notes that she gives, you should be fine. She gives exercises in class to make sure students understand and is very helpful! A++++++ prof!
No Comments
SHE IS THE MOST HELPFUL AND GOOD PROF. U CAN EVER COME ACROSS NO BODY CAN EVER GT BORED IN HER CLASS  SHE GIVES A LOT OF HOMEWORK THOUGH BT THATS FR UR OWN BENEFIT
